core_skills: Backend engineering, Apache Spark, Apache Hudi, Trino, Apache Kafka
skill_match_scores: Backend engineering:1.0, Apache Spark:1.0, Apache Hudi:0.0, Trino:0.0, Apache Kafka:1.0
must_have_quals: A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent, 2+ years of professional experience, Strong backend engineering experience, Problem-solving skills and experience working with cross-functional teams in fast-paced environments
preferred_quals: Hands-on experience with modern data stack technologies including Apache Spark, Hudi, Trino, Kafka, or similar distributed data processing frameworks, Knowledge of data lake architectures, streaming systems, and workflow orchestration platforms like Flyte
core_responsibilities: Design and build large-scale data platforms to support our AI research and autonomy stack development, handling petabytes of multimodal sensor data from real-world driving scenarios, Work on data curation and tagging platforms that enable efficient dataset discovery, labeling workflows, and quality assessment across diverse driving conditions, Build high-performance data processing systems using modern distributed computing frameworks to transform raw sensor data into training-ready formats
job_summary: Applied Intuition is powering the future of physical AI by creating digital infrastructure for moving machines. The role involves designing and building large-scale data platforms to support AI research and autonomy stack development, as well as working on data processing systems and machine learning infrastructure.
